LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-28-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT S MEDIANEWS GROUP, INC., CALIFORNIA NEWSPAPERS PARTNERSHIP, WEST COAST MEDIANEWS, LLC, MNG PARTNERSHIP HOLDINGS, LLC, AND JOHN MIHALYO'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT TRANSFERS THIS ACTION TO HUMBOLDT COUNTY. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SHALL PAY $5,926.50 TO DEFENDANTS, PLUS ANY TRANSFER FEES AND COSTS. (CODE CIV. PROC. SEC. 396B(B.) AN OFFER TO STIPULATE TO CHANGE OF VENUE WAS REASONABLY MADE AND REJECTED. (PLINER DECL. PAR. 11 & EX. G.) FURTHER, THE SELECTION OF VENUE WAS NOT MADE IN GOOD FAITH GIVEN THE FACTS AND LAW THE PARTY SELECTING THE VENUE KNEW OR SHOULD HAVE KNOWN. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-12-2021 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2021 Continued To May-25-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2021 Continued To Mar-23-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS MEDIANEWS GROUP, INC., CALIFORNIA NEWSPAPERS PARTNERSHIP, WEST COAST MEDIANEWS, LLC, MNG PARTNERSHIP HOLDINGS, LLC, AND JOHN MIHALYO'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted. No opposition filed. The Court transfers this action to Humboldt County. Plaintiff's counsel shall pay $5,926.50 to defendants, plus any transfer fees and costs. (Code Civ. Proc. sec. 396b(b.) An offer to stipulate to change of venue was reasonably made and rejected. (Pliner Decl. par. 11 & Ex. G.) Further, the selection of venue was not made in good faith given the facts and law the party selecting the venue knew or should have known.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2020 Continued To Feb-09-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2020 Continued To Oct-21-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
